proposedOptimization.summary: Require executor to emit implementation-artifact.json as a mandatory harness output; add emission step to agent-runtime.config.yml executor phase.
proposedOptimization.details: Set executors[].emits_artifacts = ['implementation-artifact'] as an enforced gate in agent-runtime.config.yml. Without this, tokenUsage, toolInvocationCount, and executionDurationMs baselines are untrackable across all issues.

expectedImpact: Enables end-to-end baseline metrics collection; unblocks token usage and tool invocation benchmarking.
notes: tokenUsage, toolInvocationCount, executionDurationMs, retryCount are 0 because implementation-artifact.json was not emitted for this issue.
